title: Modules, Packages, Environments, and Command Lines · Runtime Lens: Python Venv Dependencies
summary: Turn the reporting pipeline into an installable and repeatable command-line tool. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python venv dependencies increment in an installable data-report command. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create isolated virtual environments and record direct dependency and supported-Python constraints reproducibly.
Create package and subpackage layouts with deliberate absolute or relative imports and no hidden path mutation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
